arts.ttl: Chelsea quoted £100m to complete transfer as Pedro Neto sends exciting message
arts.sum: It’s been a positive few weeks for Chelsea with the team back in Premier League action this weekend as they look to maintain their positive form. Aston Villa have slapped a price tag of over £80 million on striking hero Jhon Duran with Chelsea reportedly maintaining their interest in the striker.

arts.ttl: Man City boss Pep Guardiola tears apart FIFA rule change that will impact Chelsea
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola has taken a firm stand against the new FIFA regulations for Club World Cup squad selections, questioning "What makes a'strongest' team?" amidst Chelsea and Manchester City being made to take their strongest squads and play their best teams. I'm not going to [have them] say before the game which player to play.

arts.ttl: Chelsea's £17m wonderkid Kendry Paez, 17, is caught up in ANOTHER partying scandal - seven months after trip to New York strip club - as Ecuador boss fires him a warning
arts.sum: Paez, who will sign for Chelsea in a £17.2million move once he turns 18 in May 2025, was at the centre of controversy that engulfed the Ecuador national team in March.

arts.ttl: Chelsea v Nottingham Forest: FPL team news + predicted line-ups
arts.sum: Team form, absentees and our predicted XIs The post Chelsea v Nottingham Forest: FPL team news + predicted line-ups appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Chelsea complete Man City raid as new signing confirmed
arts.sum: Chelsea have announced that Glenn van der Kraan has joined the club as academy technical director, completing a move from Premier League rivals Manchester City. It has been confirmed that he will lead the youth development programme alongside Jake Francis, who has taken up a new role as the academy’s football operations director.

arts.ttl: Felix over Omorodion: A Chelsea transfer blunder?
arts.sum: Chelsea and Atletico Madrid were locked in transfer talks for multiple weeks this summer, with the clubs eventually agreeing a swap deal of sorts between Conor Gallagher and Joao Felix . In the end, Chelsea agreed to re-sign Felix, with Gallagher joining Atleti and Omorodion eventually ending up at FC Porto for €25 million less than Chelsea were set to purchase him for.

arts.ttl: Future Chelsea wonderkid warned about off-field antics as lifestyle questioned
arts.sum: Now, Paez's international manager Sebastian Beccacece has called on the 17-year-old to learn how to handle his new-found fame as he prepares for a life-changing move to Stamford Bridge. However, the forward has made headlines for the wrong reasons this year - as he partied with international team-mates before Ecuador's match against Italy in March - and this week was spotted in a nightclub.

arts.ttl: Chelsea news and transfers RECAP - Gent reaction, Cole Palmer claim, Dewsbury-Hall promise - football.london
arts.sum: "It’s been a good start to the season for Forest. Chelsea backed to beat Nottingham Forest

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca gives verdict on Chelsea's Premier League title hopes
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca insists his Chelsea side are not ready to battle Arsenal and Manchester City for the Premier League title. He said the difference is that Arsenal have had the same manager for five years, [PSG] are one year and a half.

arts.ttl: Maresca rules Chelsea out of Premier League title race
arts.sum: "I really don't think we can compete with [Manchester] City and Arsenal," said the Italian, ahead of Chelsea's home match with Nottingham Forest . While all three teams have won four of their first six Premier League matches, Chelsea have scored more goals and created more big chances than both City and Arsenal, and boast a higher Expected Goals (xG) than the latter.
